{"input":{"messages":[{"type":"human","content":[{"type":"text","text":"The following is a ChemLLMBench Suzuki reaction component-selection task.
Return only the selected candidate SMILES inside [ANSWER] and [/ANSWER].

You are an expert chemist. Given selected one reactant, two reagents and solvent of a Suzuki reaction, predict the optimal reactant that maximize the yield with the rest of reaction components by using your experienced chemical reactant selection knowledge. No explanations and other information. Only return the reactant smiles from the given list. Please strictly follow the format, the template are provided as follows:
Given the rest of reaction components:
reactant: reactant 1
 ligand: ligand 1
 base: base 1
 solvent: solvent 1 
Reactant list: reactant1,reactant2,reactant3,.etc
Optimal reactant: reactant2 

Given the rest of reaction components:
reactant: CC(C)c1cc(C(C)C)c(-c2ccccc2P(C2CCCCC2)C2CCCCC2)c(C(C)C)c1
ligand: CC#N
solvent: [OH-].[K+]
base: Brc1ccc2ncccc2c1  
Reactants list for selection:
Cc1ccc2c(cnn2C2CCCCO2)c1B1OC(C)(C)C(C)(C)O1,Cc1ccc2c(cnn2C2CCCCO2)c1[B-](F)(F)F.[K+],Cc1ccc2c(cnn2C2CCCCO2)c1Br
Optimal reactant:

Use exactly this final format: [ANSWER]<selected SMILES>[/ANSWER]."}],"additional_kwargs":{}}]},"config":{"recursion_limit":1000},"context":{"model_name":"deepseek","mode":"flash","thinking_enabled":false,"is_plan_mode":false,"subagent_enabled":false,"thread_id":"5c7d2362-1b33-4121-acb7-fc3a669a7b32"},"stream_mode":["messages-tuple","values","updates","custom","events"],"stream_subgraphs":true,"stream_resumable":true,"assistant_id":"lead_agent","on_disconnect":"continue"}
